title: Sardine Japanese Pilaf
description: A savory Japanese-inspired dish featuring sardines and pilaf, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped green onions and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
Add pilaf mix and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
In a separate pan, heat the soy sauce and rice vinegar over low heat.
Add the flaked sardines to the soy sauce mixture and stir to combine.
Add the sardine mixture to the pilaf mix and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
